div.p: Non-contiguous memory regions linked by intrusive pointers sizeof=64 bytes (one cache line) per block

g.title: Root pointer in Global Pool state

ol.li: Intrusive Storage: Next pointers (8 bytes) occupy the same memory as user data will when allocated.
Chunk Agnosticism: The allocator logic treats pointers uniformly; chunk boundaries (0x1000 vs 0x5000) are transparent.

g.title: Root pointer in Global Pool state
